thesis_movers.statement: On-chain tokenized treasuries and private credit surpass $50B AUM within 12 months

top_evidence.snippet:
Maple scaled with the RWA wave.
TVL went from $45M in 2024 to $2.8B today, and in the last two months alone, the protocol earned more than in almost the previous three years combined. Timing and execution matter.

trending_topics.context: 4 posts, 7.2x baseline rate — mentioning Redis, Kimi, Arbitrum, Ethereum

sample_posts.text:
KIMI K3 AI FINDS AND EXPLOITS A ZERO-DAY IN THE LATEST REDIS SERVER USING 32 AGENTS
SOURCE

tweet.text:
Kimi K3 exploited the latest Redis server with a 0day it discovered. 

All it took was 27min with 32 agents.  

https://github.com/berabuddies/redis-poc

sample_posts.text:
BSQUARED NETWORK EXPLOITED FOR 3.86M USD
SOURCE

tweet.text:
#PeckShieldAlert @BSquaredNetwork on #BNBChain has been drained of 8.591M $B2 (worth ~$3.86M). 

The exploiter swapped the stolen funds for over 5K $WBNB, then swapped them to 1,128 $ETH and bridged out via NEAR Intents. $B2 has dropped -15%.

sample_posts.text:
BLOCKAID DETECTS EXPLOIT TARGETING AFX XYZ BRIDGE ON ARBITRUM, APPROXIMATELY 24.15M USDC DRAINED
SOURCE

tweet.text:
Blockaid detected an exploit at 2026-07-22 21:30 UTC targeting @AFX_XYZ, a protocol on @arbitrum. The exploit was specific to a bridge that AFX operates. Approximately 24.15M USDC has been drained thus far from the protocol.

Our team has been working with the incredible folks on the Arbitrum team to respond to the incident, to engage with the affected protocol, and to help them contain the stolen funds.

Exploit tx: https://arbiscan.io/tx/0x50d0b3ec6c3f5fce0f10abf81540bbb508f421494aa2b3480c4a264b0436547b

sample_posts.text:
VERUS-ETHEREUM BRIDGE EXPLOITED FOR OVER $7.5M AFTER ATTACKER USED FORGED CROSS-CHAIN PROOFS TO UNLOCK RESERVE ASSETS
SOURCE

tweet.text:
The (@VerusCoin) Verus <> Ethereum Bridge has been exploited for over $7.5M

The attacker used forged cross-chain proofs to unlock reserve assets on Ethereum that were never locked on the Verus chain.

https://arkm.com/explorer/address/0xCFd0A20703cD11E0b9f665e1C3F1Ef989C142D54

https://etherscan.io/tx/0xa1f1e65c1cea4dba4ae439cd4dcdba6cc2dbda0ed1228e61f29ae9c9324eb099

The exploiter swapped the stolen funds for over 5K $WBNB, then swapped them to 1,128 $ETH and bridged out via NEAR Intents. $B2 has dropped -15%.

sample_posts.text:
BLOCKAID DETECTS EXPLOIT TARGETING AFX XYZ BRIDGE ON ARBITRUM, APPROXIMATELY 24.15M USDC DRAINED
SOURCE

tweet.text:
Blockaid detected an exploit at 2026-07-22 21:30 UTC targeting @AFX_XYZ, a protocol on @arbitrum. The exploit was specific to a bridge that AFX operates. Approximately 24.15M USDC has been drained thus far from the protocol.

Our team has been working with the incredible folks on the Arbitrum team to respond to the incident, to engage with the affected protocol, and to help them contain the stolen funds.

Exploit tx: https://arbiscan.io/tx/0x50d0b3ec6c3f5fce0f10abf81540bbb508f421494aa2b3480c4a264b0436547b

sample_posts.text:
VERUS-ETHEREUM BRIDGE EXPLOITED FOR OVER $7.5M AFTER ATTACKER USED FORGED CROSS-CHAIN PROOFS TO UNLOCK RESERVE ASSETS
SOURCE

tweet.text:
The (@VerusCoin) Verus <> Ethereum Bridge has been exploited for over $7.5M

The attacker used forged cross-chain proofs to unlock reserve assets on Ethereum that were never locked on the Verus chain.

https://arkm.com/explorer/address/0xCFd0A20703cD11E0b9f665e1C3F1Ef989C142D54

https://etherscan.io/tx/0xa1f1e65c1cea4dba4ae439cd4dcdba6cc2dbda0ed1228e61f29ae9c9324eb099

Maple scaled with the RWA wave.
TVL went from $45M in 2024 to $2.8B today, and in the last two months alone, the protocol earned more than in almost the previous three years combined. Timing and execution matter.
